form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth behind Yorokobi at this track over 1609m in a NW5000L5 on April 7 at $34.73. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 3 m by Tobins Chester (1:54.10) in NW5000L5 on March 26 at $4.81. Strong winning hope.
